pundit.name: Eric Wynalda
pundit.take: **Mustard Boy and The Backpass Assassin are the Laurel and Hardy of this World Cup pool.** Zach, seriously, did you close your eyes and point at a FIFA game screen when drafting? Brazil’s the only team holding your sorry roster together, and yet you’re barely tied with a 15-year-old. As for Gayden, I’m baffled you’re even in this so-called competition; picking Jordan as a Tier 4 team is laughable, and your results reflect it — dead last with 23 points? Disgraceful. Meanwhile, Rafe, The Noisemaker, is outperforming expectations, but let's face it, outperforming Zach and Gayden is like outdribbling traffic cones. Gunner, aka Bubba G, is the only one with a clue here, leading the pack with 29 points thanks to France's dominant performance. I played in a World Cup, I know what winning looks like, and it sure doesn't include being overtaken by the likes of Devin’s chaotic ragtag bunch.

pundit_takes.headline: Gunner's Teams Dominate While Rest Fumble in World Cup Pool
pundit_takes.subtitle: Senegal's 5-0 thrashing propels 'Bubba G' to first place.

pundit_takes.headline: Mustard Boy Hopes Ghana Can Strike Gold Against Croatia
pundit_takes.subtitle: Zach looks for answers after Saudi Arabia's goalless draw.

pundit_takes.headline: Ghost Pepper Closes in on Top Spot Thanks to Spain
pundit_takes.subtitle: Devin stays hot on Gunner's heels after Uruguay win.

pundit_takes.headline: Backpass Assassin Relies on England to Justify Draft Strategy
pundit_takes.subtitle: Gayden's ranking hinges on England's match against undrafted Panama.

rome_analytics_quotes: Rafe rides chaos, embarrasses dad, and still ranks higher than Gayden. Thanksgiving'll be spicy!
Gunner's Tier-1 dependability is all France, like croissants, flaky but strong.
Rafe obliterates Devin 6-0; kid's got his number like a schoolyard bully.
Model's odds swing as Gunner surges, proving predictions are as reliable as weather forecasts.
